---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change before investing time in code
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**
What are you trying to do that the SDK doesn't support today?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see — client API shape, config option, NestJS
integration. Sketch it, no need for a full design.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workaround you're using now.

**Scope check**
Per [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md), significant changes are
discussed here before code — this issue is that discussion. Note if this
also needs a change on the [Letopis server](https://github.com/max-trifonov/letopis)
side.
